chemical_rationale: Approximate hydrophobicity and polarity matching between pesticide analytes and DES systems
main_limitation: Does not capture phase behavior, activity coefficients, or solvent microstructure

chemical_rationale: Approximate polar surface compatibility and polar interaction potential
main_limitation: Does not capture explicit solvation or local hydrogen-bond networks

chemical_rationale: Approximate donor–acceptor complementarity between analyte and DES components
main_limitation: Does not represent directional or dynamic H-bond networks

chemical_rationale: Approximate molecular size, dispersion-related interactions, and steric compatibility
main_limitation: Does not encode molecular shape or conformer-specific interactions
Coarse proxy; does not model conformational ensembles

chemical_rationale: Preserve HBA/HBD composition and molar-ratio information
Capture mismatch, proportional contrast, and simple interaction proxies
main_limitation: Descriptive transformations, not mechanistic interaction energies
